text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho has finally arrived. Nice Nature is
more nervous than ever before, as she will face
Tokai Teio head-to-head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However... just before the start of the race, Nice
Nature learns that Tokai Teio has been injured
and must withdraw from the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her entire reason for participating in the Kikuka
Sho now gone, Nice Nature becomes distraught
and unfocused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I have a word with her, Nice Nature
manages to regain her composure and steps out
onto the track.
